title: VNC Cloud Address
description: A static cloud address that uniquely identifies a device participating in VNC Cloud connectivity brokering.

cloudAddress.description: The unique VNC Cloud address identifier assigned to the device.

allowedActions.description: Whether this cloud address is used to initiate connections (connect) or accept them (listen).

groups.description: Logical group names associated with this cloud address for organizational purposes.

AccessControl.description: Fine-grained access control configuration specifying which groups and peer addresses may connect.

groups.description: Group names permitted to establish connections to this address.

cloudAddresses.description: Specific VNC cloud addresses permitted to connect to this address.
